preferred_components.reason: Primary product actions use AppButton for analytics and approved defaults.

approved_wrappers.name: AppButton
approved_wrappers.reason: Adds analytics and product defaults without changing the underlying Salt primitive.

token_aliases.reason: Product surfaces use the local border alias so repo theming stays centralized.

theme_defaults.reason: The app wraps canonical Salt theme defaults in one repo-level provider.

token_family_policies.reason: Container roles should route through the repo token aliases.

pattern_preferences.reason: The app wraps canonical Salt navigation inside one approved shell component.

banned_choices.name: UNSTABLE_SaltProviderNext
banned_choices.reason: The app is standardized on SaltProvider only.

notes: Keep canonical Salt guidance and project conventions separate in final recommendations.
Do not present repo wrappers as if they were part of the official Salt registry.
